description:
Cerberus stands before Saber and Ayaka inside the dreamworld. Though the police were fighting alongside them, the wounds Saber bore from his previous battle has put him in a critical situation. In an attempt to shake off the weakness that dwells within her, Ayaka hurries to be by his side. But before she can reach him, the shadow of "Little Red" appears before her. Faced with the terrifying specter of her past, the symbol of her deepest fears, she says...
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: At the End of the Rope
